name: vibe-check
description: MCP server for VibeCheck. Reads live browser performance snapshots and detected issues (jank, memory leaks, DOM bloat, layout shift, failing SEO/AEO audits) so a coding agent can see what it broke and fix it.

tools.name: get_performance_snapshot
tools.description: Get the latest browser performance snapshot including frame rate, web vitals, memory, resources, and detected issues.

tools.name: get_detected_issues
tools.description: Get active (not resolved or acknowledged) performance issues. Optionally filter by severity or detector name.

tools.name: get_fix_suggestions
tools.description: Get detailed fix suggestions for a specific issue, including step-by-step instructions and code examples.

tools.name: watch_performance
tools.description: Wait for the next browser performance snapshot update and return it. Useful for monitoring changes after a fix.

tools.name: acknowledge_issue
tools.description: Mark a performance issue as acknowledged so it stops appearing in get_detected_issues.

tools.name: resolve_issue
tools.description: Mark a performance issue as resolved so it stops appearing in get_detected_issues.
